_instructions.how_to_add: Copy any item block from the 'listings' array below, paste it, change the values, save.
_instructions.how_to_remove: Delete the entire { } block for that item. Make sure commas between items stay correct.
_instructions.games: Must be exactly one of: pokemon, magic, yugioh
_instructions.condition: Must be exactly one of: NM, LP, MP, HP
_instructions.image: Set to a URL or leave blank. Stock 0 = hidden from store.
_instructions.stock: Set to 0 to hide the item from the store automatically.
_instructions.id: Must be a unique number. Just increment from the last one.
